text: Staying at Noma Village was transformative. I shipped two features while surfing every other day and made friends I still talk to. The wifi was flawless and the community dinners were a highlight.
Loved the yoga by the pool and the balance of focus and play. Super clean rooms and plenty of quiet nooks to work.
Amazing community vibe. Weekly masterminds helped me get clarity on my product roadmap. Walkable to beaches.
Fantastic coliving experience in Lagos. The shared coworking spaces are bright and quiet. Surfed at sunrise and still made my standups.
Felt welcomed from day one. Hosts are attentive and the events are perfectly paced for introverts and extroverts alike.
